headline: ₹50-200 Cr at risk — US imposes 126% solar import duties, triggering 14% crash in Waaree Energies shares and investor flight
what_matters: Triggered BRSR, GRI, TCFD frameworks; risk of SEBI scrutiny and trading restrictions if disclosures lag.
P/E compression of 5-10% likely; margin erosion expected if US export revenues decline.
Cost of capital likely to rise by 20-40bps due to perceived regulatory and disclosure risk; possible FII outflow.
action: Immediate board-level review required to assess US exposure, disclosure upgrades, and market diversification.
Opportunity: ESG narrative differentiation via proactive disclosure and market diversification
